facial_anchors.mask: Silver/Iron weathered mask covering the face, often obscured by a deep green hood
facial_anchors.features: Focused, vengeful eyes visible through mask slits

costume_anchors.outer: Deep green/dark grey hooded cloak, weathered and tattered at the hem
costume_anchors.armor: Dark weathered leather chest armor and pauldrons (non-heavy, for speed)
costume_anchors.lower: Matching dark trousers and leather boots
costume_anchors.weapon: Canxiang (残响) - dual curved short blades with intricate resonance slots and silver hilts

visual_quality_spec: 8K Masterpiece, 35mm film grain, Low-key photography, high contrast highlights on metallic mask and blades, volumetric blizzard/snow effect, high-texture detail on weathered leather and rough cloak fabric.
